title: SECI Opens Bids For Green Hydrogen Production Under SIGHT Scheme: Major Players Emerge With 620,000 MT Capacity
content: The Solar Energy Corporation of India Limited (SECI) has opened Envelope-1 for its Request for Selection (RfS) under the SIGHT Scheme (Mode-1-Tranche-II) to set up green hydrogen production facilities in India. The process saw participation from prominent companies, showcasing significant interest in green hydrogen production.
author: Analysts Account
